data.title: Ibotta To Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: In Denver, Ibotta (NYSE: IBTA), a major digital promotions network in North America, will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on May 6, 2026. Following the release, a conference call and webcast discussing the financial results, recent developments, and business outlook will be held by management at 2:30 p.m. MT/4:30 p.m. ET on the same day. This event will provide insights on Ibotta's performance in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Kilroy Realty Publishes Fifteenth Annual Sustainability Report
data.description: In Los Angeles today, Kilroy Realty Corporation (NYSE: KRC) released its fifteenth annual Sustainability Report, showcasing advancements towards its 2030 Environmental and Social Goals. The report underscores the company's enduring commitment to sustainability. The 2025 Sustainability Report outlines Kilroy's strategy, goals, performance, and impact on environmental, social, and governance fronts, highlighting their leadership in sustainability efforts. This demonstrates their dedication to transparency and accountability.

data.title: Carlisle Companies to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on April 23, 2026
data.description: Scottsdale, Ariz.-- Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL) is set to announce its first quarter financial results on April 23, 2026, after the market closes. An earnings conference call is scheduled for 5pm ET on the same day. The call, which will discuss the company's performance, can be accessed through webcast at www.carlisle.com/investors/events-and-presentations, or via telephone at the following numbers: Domestic toll free: 800-715-9871 and International: 646-307-1963. Make sure to provide the Conference ID for participation.

data.title: Agree Realty Declares Increased Monthly Common Dividend
data.description: In Royal Oak, Michigan, Agree Realty Corporation (NYSE: ADC) declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.267 per common share, showing a 1.9% increase from the previous month. This equates to an annualized dividend of $3.204 per common share, marking a 4.3% rise from the prior annualized dividend of $3.072 per common share in the second quarter of 2025.

data.title: Black Hills Corp. Schedules 2026 First-Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Black Hills Corp. (NYSE: BKH) is set to disclose its first-quarter financial performance for 2026 after the market closes on May 6, 2026. A live conference call and webcast will be held on May 7, 2026, at 11 a.m. EDT to deliberate on the results with investors and industry analysts. The session will provide insights and analysis on the company's earnings report following the conclusion of the quarter.

data.title: Certara to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 11th, 2026
data.description: Certara, Inc. based in Radnor, Pennsylvania, disclosed that they will be sharing their financial status for the first quarter of 2026 before the market opens on May 11, 2026. As a prominent figure in model-informed drug development, the company (Nasdaq: CERT) will have their management conduct a conference call at 8:30 AM ET on the same day to delve into the details of their financial performance.

data.title: California Water Service Group Schedules 2026 First-Quarter Earnings Results Announcement and Conference Call
data.description: SAN JOSE, California - California Water Service Group (NYSE: CWT) stated that the first-quarter earnings for 2026 will be disclosed on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The results will come out at 9:00 a.m. ET, followed by an earnings conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET. Interested individuals, including stockholders and investors, can join the conference call by dialing 1-800-715-9871 or 1-646-307-1963 and entering ID# 9611023. Alternatively, the live audio webcast can be accessed at: https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/tadkppmm.

data.title: NSTS Bancorp, Inc. Announces Passing of Nathan E. Walker, Chief Executive Officer and President of North Shore Trust and Savings
data.description: In an announcement made on April 09, 2026, NSTS Bancorp, Inc. shared the unfortunate news of the passing of Nathan E. Walker, who held the positions of Chief Executive Officer and President of North Shore Trust and Savings, as well as Executive Vice President of the company. Beginning his journey as a teller in 1996, Mr. Walker's dedication and leadership propelled him to these roles since 2022. Known for his courage, integrity, and compassion, he leaves behind a legacy demonstrated through the relationships he nurtured, the impact on lives, and the culture he helped cultivate within the bank.

data.title: Solana Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) Appoints Madelene Gani as Chief Operating Officer and Deputy CFO to Lead Next Phase of Growth
data.description: Ms. Gani, with a strong background in architecting Gemini’s Asia Pacific expansion, has been appointed to spearhead the institutional buildout at Solana Company. This move aligns with Solana's strategic objectives to increase yield, boost revenue streams, diversify their business, and establish a more institutional presence within the Solana ecosystem. This marks a key step forward as Solana Company intensifies its efforts to strengthen its position in the market.

data.title: Expedia Group to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) is set to release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The report will cover the period ending March 31, 2026, and will be shared through an earnings release and webcast. Investors can access these materials on the company's Investor Relations page at http://ir.expediagroup.com. The earnings release will be published after the market closes, followed by a webcast starting at 1:30 PM PT / 4:30 PM ET. A replay of the webcast is anticipated.

data.title: Lattice Receives 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces Award
data.description: Lattice Semiconductor, a leading low power programmable company based in Hillsboro, Oregon, has received the prestigious 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award. This recognition is a result of direct feedback from employees through surveys, highlighting 15 culture drivers that contribute to high performance compared to industry standards. The CEO, Ford Tamer, credited the company's success to its dedicated workforce, emphasizing their role in driving innovation and achievement. Lattice Semiconductor (NASDAQ: LSCC) has demonstrated a commitment to employee engagement and excellence in the workplace.

data.title: Mattel Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call Date
data.description: Toy company Mattel disclosed that it will unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 29, 2026, around 4:05 p.m. EST. A webcast conference call is scheduled to take place at 5:00 p.m. EST on the same day. Interested individuals can access the webcast and presentation slides on Mattel's Investor Relations website. The webcast link will be available at https://investors.mattel.com.

data.title: WD-40 Company Reports Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In San Diego, WD-40 Company (NASDAQ:WDFC) announced its financial results for the second fiscal quarter ending February 28, 2026. The company, known for creating innovative products to address various challenges in workshops, factories, and homes globally, reported total net sales of $161.7 million for the quarter, marking an 11% rise from the same period in the previous fiscal year. This highlights the company's continued growth and success in delivering solutions to customers worldwide.

data.title: Papa Johns to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Global pizza chain Papa John's International, Inc. has revealed details regarding its upcoming earnings call for the first quarter of 2026. The company, headquartered in Louisville, Kentucky, will be discussing financial performance and results for the specified period. This announcement signals an important update for investors and stakeholders eager to learn about the performance of the firm during the first quarter of the year. Stay tuned for more information on this critical financial update.

data.title: Congruence Announces Participation in the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
data.description: On April 9, 2026, in Montreal, QC, Congruence Therapeutics, a biotechnology company in the clinical stage, is utilizing computational methods to develop a distinctive portfolio of pharmacological correctors for disorders caused by protein misfolding. This includes addressing MC4R-deficient genetic obesity and GBA1-driven diseases.

data.title: MP Materials Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Webcast
data.description: In Las Vegas, MP Materials Corp. (NYSE: MP) is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The report will be made public after the U.S. markets wrap up on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Following this, MP Materials’ executives will conduct a conference call and webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) on the same day. Before this event, a press release and slide presentation will be published on their investor relations website at https://investors.mpmaterials.com/.

data.title: CUPE Library Workers Call on Government to Reconsider Problematic Legislation
data.description: In Lethbridge, Alberta, Dax Law, CUPE 70 Library Director, addressed reporters regarding the implications of Bill 28 on library workers. The bill mandates the physical separation of materials deemed "explicit" by the government, posing challenges for staff in interpreting and implementing the vague and problematic legislation. This segregation will render such materials inaccessible to the public without assistance from library staff. Currently, there is ambiguity surrounding the number of items in the library's collection that will be affected by this bill.

data.title: SiTime Corporation to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, SiTime Corporation (Nasdaq: SITM), specializing in Precision Timing, is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, following the close of the market.
